tasks.subject: Task 1: gblp1-inspect host tool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A host + aarch64-Android static C tool that parses a GBLP1 container out of an EFISP-style image and emits machine-greppable per-entry lines with SHA-256 verification.

**Files:** tools/gblp1-inspect/Makefile, tools/gblp1-inspect/gblp1-inspect.c, scripts/build-recovery-tools.sh, tests/host/084_gblp1_inspect.sh

**Verify:** bash tests/host/084_gblp1_inspect.sh → PASS: 084 gblp1-inspect

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/gblp1-inspect/Makefile", "tools/gblp1-inspect/gblp1-inspect.c", "scripts/build-recovery-tools.sh", "tests/host/084_gblp1_inspect.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/084_gblp1_inspect.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["host build succeeds", "android cross-build succeeds", "result: ok on clean payload", "result: ok on EFISP-prefixed payload", "result: bad_crc on header corruption", "result: entry_sha_mismatch on entry corruption", "result: not_a_gblp1 on random input", "scripts/build-recovery-tools.sh produces dist/recovery/gblp1-inspect", "tests/host/084_gblp1_inspect.sh passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: vbmeta-graft list-hash subcommand
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add list-hash <active-vbmeta> <byname-dir> subcommand emitting per-descriptor digest/graft/verdict triples per spec §7.4.

**Files:** tools/vbmeta-graft/vbmeta-graft.c, tests/host/085_vbmeta_descriptor_hash.sh

**Verify:** bash tests/host/074_vbmeta_graft.sh && bash tests/host/085_vbmeta_descriptor_hash.sh

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/vbmeta-graft/vbmeta-graft.c", "tests/host/085_vbmeta_descriptor_hash.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/074_vbmeta_graft.sh && bash tests/host/085_vbmeta_descriptor_hash.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["list-hash emits partition=/type=/declared=/digest=/graft=/verdict= per descriptor", "digest=ok on a matching partition", "digest=mismatch on a perturbed body", "graft=ok on a partition carrying a stock OEM vbmeta at the natural offset", "graft=missing when no embedded vbmeta resolves", "list/check/graft subcommands unchanged — 074 still passes", "085 test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: diag.sh rewrite + bundle collection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite zip/modes/diag.sh to produce the on-screen summary, /sdcard bundle, four confidence tiers. Add host dry-run test.

**Files:** zip/modes/diag.sh, zip/modes/diag.conf, tests/host/086_diag_dryrun.sh, tests/host/helpers/diag_fake_byname.sh

**Verify:** bash tests/host/086_diag_dryrun.sh → PASS: 086 diag dryrun

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zip/modes/diag.sh", "zip/modes/diag.conf", "tests/host/086_diag_dryrun.sh", "tests/host/helpers/diag_fake_byname.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/086_diag_dryrun.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["diag.sh prints all required section headings", "bundle dir contains every file listed in spec §5", "tar.gz sibling produced", "HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/NONE tier scripted scenarios match expected headline", "diag.conf MODE_TOOLS includes vbmeta-graft fv-unwrap gblp1-inspect", "086 test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Cross-build + refresh vendored bins + build ZIP + open PR
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cross-build recovery tools, refresh zip/bin via update-tools.sh, build diag ZIP, push branch, open PR against main.

**Files:** zip/bin/MANIFEST, zip/bin/gblp1-inspect, zip/bin/vbmeta-graft, dist/gbl-chainload-diag.zip

**Verify:** bash tests/runall.sh && gh pr view --json url -q .url

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zip/bin/MANIFEST", "zip/bin/gblp1-inspect", "zip/bin/vbmeta-graft", "dist/gbl-chainload-diag.zip"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/runall.sh && gh pr view --json url -q .url", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dist/recovery/gblp1-inspect produced by build-recovery-tools.sh", "zip/bin/MANIFEST refreshed with gblp1-inspect line and new vbmeta-graft hash", "dist/gbl-chainload-diag.zip exists", "tests/runall.sh ends ALL TESTS PASS", "branch diag-confidence pushed", "PR opened against main with URL"]}
```
